purpose: Lessons Vault — what worked, what failed, why

entries.lesson: Multiple logo components and PNG paths caused design drift and cache confusion.
entries.why: No single authority path; assumed files were active without render-path verification.
entries.fix: LOGO governance + V3 /logo pack; verify Homepage → Component → Asset before changes.

entries.lesson: Hero photo outweighed brand mark; failed logo authority review.
entries.why: Decoration/Level-5 imagery competed with Level-1 logo.
entries.fix: Logo first at all widths; solid Dark Luxury pane; reduce L3 on mobile.

entries.lesson: Dev server restart loops on EADDRINUSE:3001.
entries.why: Multiple next/dev PIDs racing after kill.
entries.fix: Kill all next/shortkey node PIDs; wait; single scripts/dev.mjs start.

entries.lesson: UX family consensus + Design Intelligence Cluster improved homepage score 32→44/50.
entries.fix: Keep UX routing defaults; nudge Sonnet +1% on next UX task.

entries.lesson: Hero used V3 logo but header still rendered legacy ctrl+BEAUTY KeyCap mark.
entries.why: HeaderBrandSection never wired to Logo /logo pack after V3 install.
entries.fix: COMP-010 must use Logo size=header surface=light; verify render path includes header.
